_meta.purpose: sim-real differential-gate volume tolerance envelope, keyed by volume band (REF-P3 / INDEX_REF_P3 §Convergence(a)).
_meta.semantics: acceptance = real result MUST lie inside the simulator-DECLARED envelope; the gate only does a containment test, it never recomputes the envelope.
_meta.provenance: Opentrons GEN2 white-paper accuracy/precision spectrum (P20/P300/P1000, decoded verbatim in INDEX_REF_P3 signal 2.1) as the primary seed; ISO 8655-2 MPE shape as cross-check. These are VENDOR SPEC placeholders, NOT this instrument's measured gravimetric data.
_meta.discipline_never_tighter: 真机重量法数据出现前永不更严 -- before real gravimetric (weight-method) data exists, this envelope may only be WIDENED (>= vendor spec), never tightened. Setting the gate stricter than the vendor spec would manufacture false negatives (real hardware never outruns its own factory spec). See INDEX_REF_P3 §Convergence(a)(ii) and Reject-list #5.
_meta.dual_representation: each band carries BOTH a percent bound and a microliter FLOOR; the acceptance bound for a volume is max(pct-derived, floor) -- the WIDER wins, so near the minimum volume the absolute-uL floor dominates and a pure-% bound does not distort (INDEX_REF_P3 signal 1.3 / Reject-list #2).
_meta.systematic_vs_random: systematic (accuracy, |mean-target|) and random (precision, CV) are DECLARED SEPARATELY and must be checked separately -- never folded into a single RMS/total-error (INDEX_REF_P3 §Convergence(b) / Reject-list #3). The per-action ledger carries ONE observed volume per transfer, so the differential gate applies the SYSTEMATIC (accuracy) bound + uL floor per action; the RANDOM (CV) channel requires N>=10 replicate observations per volume and is RESERVED until a replicate-bearing ledger exists (fields carried below for that future consumer).
_meta.multichannel_note: multi-channel heads (8/12/96) double the MPE (ISO 8655 multi-channel doubling, INDEX_REF_P3 signal 1.3); pass channels>1 to the gate to apply the x2 widening per channel.

bands.source: Opentrons P300 mid x P1000 min
Opentrons P1000 GEN2 mid/max (widest end of 0.7-1.0% / 5-7uL, never-tighter discipline)
